lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the N+1 guidance beyond repository query methods to explicitly cover service-layer loops that repeatedly load broad datasets (e.g., per-row lookups in list endpoints), and recommend batch prefetch/join strategies for admin listing APIs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-password-reset-and-user-management and support-ticket-github-integration reviews both identified service-layer N+1 patterns in list paths (login audit enrichment and per-ticket user resolution).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify canonical password reset storage: PasswordResetToken should be the single mechanism, and legacy inline resetToken/resetExpiry fields on UserAccount should be treated as deprecated and not used by new/updated flows.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-password-reset-and-user-management review found unified endpoint uses PasswordResetToken, while AuthService.forgotPassword still writes legacy inline resetToken/resetExpiry fields.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a clear exception policy for company_id conventions: global/platform-level tables (e.g., public changelog) may omit company_id when intentionally cross-tenant, with a brief justification in migration/entity comments.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: changelog-system review flagged convention ambiguity: changelog_entries intentionally global but AGENTS currently states all business tables must include company_id.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce controller conventions with explicit checks: request DTOs should use @Valid where Bean Validation annotations are present, and @Transactional should stay at service layer unless there is a documented exception.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: export-approval-gate review found a request DTO with Bean Validation constraints not annotated with @Valid in controller and redundant @Transactional on controller method.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit fallback guidance for non-ideal worker environments: mission file discovery when standard paths are missing, and branch-recovery procedure when inheriting partially modified working state so TDD and startup steps remain auditable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple superadmin-ux feature handoffs reported deviations due to missing mission context file paths and inherited in-flight branch state; workers requested procedure clarifications in skill feedback.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For GitHub-integrated features, add a checklist item to verify category-to-label mapping and note practical API polling limits/rate-budget expectations when schedulers are introduced.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: support-ticket-github-integration review found missing labels in issue creation payload and highlighted recurring-rate polling behavior that should be intentionally documented.

rejectedObservations.observation: Changelog admin entities not using Lombok
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented (current AGENTS convention explicitly allows non-Lombok classes and this implementation is consistent with existing admin domain entities)

rejectedObservations.observation: Export approval uses approvedBy/approvedAt fields for rejection decisions
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific naming nuance; non-blocking and not broad enough for shared-state guidance

rejectedObservations.observation: Support ticket list endpoint lacks pagination
rejectedObservations.reason: product-scope decision; no milestone-wide convention currently requiring pagination on every admin listing endpoint

rejectedObservations.observation: Support ticket sync scheduler uses cron instead of fixedDelay
rejectedObservations.reason: implementation-level divergence with limited practical impact and not a shared-state documentation gap by itself
ambiguous policy preference; no established global rule requiring uniqueness for these specific fields
